days.title: Arrival and Marina Bay Exploration
days.weather: Partly cloudy, 28°C/31°C. High humidity with a chance of afternoon thunderstorms. Seasonal estimate for mid-June.
activities: Check into hotel and rest after flight.
Visit Marina Bay Sands SkyPark Observation Deck.
Walk around Gardens by the Bay (Supertree Grove).
days.budgetNote: Day 1 costs are low; focus is on arrival and free/low-cost scenic walks.

days.title: Sentosa Island Adventure
days.weather: Sunny intervals, 29°C/32°C. Warm and humid. Rain possible late evening.
activities: Take the Sentosa Express to Sentosa Island.
Relax at Siloso Beach or visit S.E.A. Aquarium.
days.budgetNote: Major expense day due to theme park ticket. Budget allocation approx SGD 150-200 for entry fees.

days.title: VivoCity and Harbourfront Culture
days.weather: Cloudy with scattered showers, 27°C/30°C. Typical monsoon season weather.
activities: Spend morning shopping and dining at VivoCity.
Take a sunset cruise from HarbourFront Centre.
days.budgetNote: Moderate spending on shopping and museum tickets. Cruise may exceed budget if not pre-booked.

days.title: Cultural Heritage Tour
days.weather: Heavy rain likely, 26°C/29°C. Prepare for wet conditions.
activities: Explore Chinatown and Buddha Tooth Relic Temple.
Visit Little India for street art and culture.
Dine at Maxwell Food Centre for local hawker food.
days.budgetNote: Low cost day focusing on affordable local food and free temple visits.

days.title: Final Souvenirs and Departure
days.weather: Partly cloudy, 28°C/31°C. Clearing skies before departure.
activities: Last-minute shopping at Orchard Road or Jewel Changi Airport.
Enjoy a farewell meal at a local restaurant.
Head to Changi Airport for departure.
days.budgetNote: Budget reserved for souvenirs and final meals. Total trip budget carefully managed to stay within SGD 1400.

categories.name: Clothing
items: Hat or cap for sun protection

categories.name: Electronics
items: Universal travel adapter (Singapore uses Type G)

categories.name: Documents & Money
items: Small amount of SGD cash for hawker centers and taxis
